spec_match.rationale: Walks through the motivating edge-CDN use case for adding a Speculation-Rules header without broadening the customer's script-src.

interactive.rationale: Changing the CSP preset or header path updates the pre-131/post-131 verdicts and the strategy comparison live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The walkthrough now covers the edge injection flow and the alternatives a CDN operator would compare.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes the requested comparison of header injection, script-src extension, and nonce-based HTML rewriting.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared variables, responsive strategy cards, and text-node rendering for editable path output.

summary: Resolved the CDN alternatives follow-up. Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome/148.0.0.0 verified /v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/cdn-injected-rules/?verify=after-strategies: the comparison panel covers header injection, script-src extension, and nonce rewriting; editing the path updates all panels; a markup-like path remained literal with zero injected image nodes; console was clean and mobile-width scroll stayed within the viewport.
